synthetic_records.scope: 6 records (2 per table: customer, project, resource) created during Task 4 field validation

schema_delta.scope: 35 added fields (29 created + 6 pre-existing matched), 1 enum extension (source_channel +7 options), 4 new views
schema_delta.reason: Schema delta is part of v1.1 and required for R6 migration. Rollback would be destructive and counterproductive.
schema_delta.rollback_plan_if_needed: To rollback schema delta: (1) delete 4 new views via +view-delete; (2) revert source_channel enum by removing 7 added options (cannot remove options in use - ensure no records reference them first); (3) delete 29 new fields via +field-delete. This plan is DOCUMENTED ONLY and NOT EXECUTED.
